name: Tangy Grilled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Scotch bonnet or habanero, chile, stem and seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped chile and bell pepper with thyme and Worcestershire sauce. Mix well.
2. In a separate pan, sauté garlic and shallots in butter until lightly browned.
3. Stir in tomato paste, white wine, and vinegar. Add the chile mixture, bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes. Allow to cool.
4. Marinate chicken in sauce for 3 to 4 hours in refrigerator.
5. Preheat barbecue. Arrange chicken on hot grill and cook, turning pieces often and basting with sauce.
